asset_type: contact sheet for academic paper framework SVG icon refinement
prompt:
Create a clean contact sheet of 25 minimalist academic vector-style icons on a white background. Use one icon per grid cell with generous whitespace around every icon, no text, no labels, no watermark. Style: consistent thin dark outline, subtle pale blue fills, rounded corners, publication-quality PPT-friendly symbols, readable at small size. Optimize each icon by its meaning, not by copying any source-paper figure. Icons in order:
1. 3D scene graph (3D scene graph, object relations)
2. embedding map (embedding map, latent cluster)
3. matrix taxonomy (matrix taxonomy, comparison matrix)
4. token stream (token stream, sequence tokens)
5. memory bank (memory bank, database, index)
6. point cloud (point cloud, 3D points)
7. multi-view fusion (multi-view, camera views)
8. evidence side card (evidence card, claim card)
9. ablation grid (ablation grid, comparison board)
10. before-after strip (before after, input output strip)
11. qualitative example grid (qualitative grid, example grid)
12. data-model-metric chain (dataset model metric, evaluation pipeline)
13. cascade routing flow (cascade, small-to-large model)
14. speculative decoding loop (speculative decoding, draft verify)
15. iterative self-refinement (self-refine, critique revise)
16. staged curriculum flow (curriculum, staged training)
17. safety guardrail path (safety guardrail, policy filter)
18. failure mode panel (failure panel, error cases)
19. teacher-student distillation (teacher student, distillation)
20. contrastive pair architecture (contrastive pair, positive negative)
21. autoencoder bottleneck (latent bottleneck, encoder bottleneck decoder)
22. U-Net skip architecture (U-Net, skip connections)
23. flow matching path (flow matching, probability path)
24. GAN generator-discriminator (GAN, generator discriminator)
25. classifier head (classifier head, prediction head)
negative_prompt: No source-paper labels, no equations, no metrics, no datasets, no dense UI screenshots, no raster texture, no 3D render shadows, no tiny unreadable details.
intended_postprocess: cut each grid cell, inspect semantics, then programmatically redraw as editable SVG primitives
